title: Pie Chart
text: The pie class renders items as equal-sized wedges of a circle. It is a separate layout from .circle-flow and uses the same filters: [circle-flow] extension.

title: Pie Chart
text:

title: Pie Chart
text:
Gap between slices
Add the .gap modifier to offset all slices outward, creating visible separation.

title: Node Shapes
text: The node shape is controlled by a modifier class on the .circle-flow container. The default is node-circle.

title: Node Shapes
text:
node-circle (default)
Filled circle nodes. No class needed — this is the default.
::: circle-flow
::: item

title: Node Shapes
text:
node-box
Rounded rectangle nodes. Width is nodeRadius × 1.8, height is nodeRadius × 1.2.
::: {.circle-flow .node-box}

title: Colors
text: Colors are set via data-* attributes. Always use the data- prefix — plain hyphenated attributes are not reliably passed through by Pandoc.

title: Colors
text:
All nodes the same color
Set node-color on the container to apply one color to all nodes.
::: {.circle-flow .node-box node-color="#27ae60"}

text:

title: Customization
text:
Classes applied to the .circle-flow div.



Class
Description




circle-flow
Required. Marks the container.


node-circle
(default) Circular nodes.


node-box
Rounded rectangle nodes.


node-none
Text-only, no node background.


arrow-chevron
(default) Filled chevron arrows.


arrow-curved
Filled SVG arc arrows.


arrow-thin
Thin SVG lines with arrowheads.


arrow-ring
Single ring circle behind nodes.


arrow-arc
Single filled clockwise arc.


arrow-double
Thin lines, arrowheads both ends.

title: Customization
text:
Classes applied to the .circle-flow div.



Class
Description




circle-flow
Required. Marks the container.


node-circle
(default) Circular nodes.


node-box
Rounded rectangle nodes.


node-none
Text-only, no node background.


arrow-chevron
(default) Filled chevron arrows.


arrow-curved
Filled SVG arc arrows.


arrow-thin
Thin SVG lines with arrowheads.


arrow-ring
Single ring circle behind nodes.


arrow-arc
Single filled clockwise arc.


arrow-double
Thin lines, arrowheads both ends.

title: Customization
text:
Container attributes



Attribute
Description




node-color
Color for all nodes (default #2e6b8a).


arrow-color
Color for all arrows (default #2e6b8a).

title: Customization
text:
Item attributes



Attribute
Description




color
Overrides node color for this item only.

title: Customization
text:
Pie classes
The .pie layout is a separate container type. See Pie charts for examples.







Class
Description




pie
Required on the container. Renders a pie chart instead of a ring of nodes.


gap on container
Separate every slice with an offset; removes the white slice stroke.


gap on an item
Offset just that slice from the center.



Pie containers accept node-color (base slice color); individual items accept color (per-slice override).

title: Customization
text:
Sizing behavior
Node size and layout radius are computed from n (number of items). The gap between neighboring circle edges equals nodeRadius. The formula is:
nodeRadius = (2/3) · layoutR · sin(π/n)
layoutR + nodeRadius ≤ 240
For n=1: layoutR=0, nodeRadius=240 (fills the container).
Font size is scaled using canvas measureText so the longest label fills the node without overflow. For node-none, the label width is capped at 80px.

title: Arrow Types
text: The arrow style is controlled by a modifier class on the .circle-flow container. The default is arrow-chevron.

title: Arrow Types
text:
arrow-chevron (default)
Div-based filled chevron shapes, scaled proportionally with node size.
::: {.circle-flow .node-box}

arrow-curved

title: quarto-chevrons
text: quarto-chevrons is a Quarto extension that adds circular flow diagrams to Reveal.js presentations. Items are arranged in a circle with customizable node shapes and arrow types.

title: quarto-chevrons
text:
Installation
quarto add EmilHvitfeldt/quarto-chevrons

title: quarto-chevrons
text:
Basic Usage
Activate the extension in your document YAML:
filters:
  - circle-flow
Then use the circle-flow div with nested item divs:
::: circle-flow
::: item
Alice
:::
::: item
Bob
:::
::: item
Carol
:::
:::


Alice


Bob


Carol

title: quarto-chevrons
text:
Item Count
The layout automatically adjusts to any number of items. With a single item there is no arrow.


Alice


With two items, arrows are offset so they don’t overlap.


Alice


Bob


Three or more items are arranged evenly around the circle.


Alice


Bob


Carol




Alice


Bob


Carol


Dave


Node size scales down automatically as more items are added.


Alice


Bob


Carol


Dave


Ethan




Alice


Bob


Carol


Dave


Ethan


Fiona

title: quarto-chevrons
text:
What’s Next

Node Shapes — circle, box, and text-only nodes
Arrow Types — chevron, curved, thin, ring, arc, and double arrows
Colors — global and per-node color control
Customization — full class and attribute reference
